resources.string: KorailTalk list screen: auto refresh until a seat becomes available, then open price and reservation entry. Use only on your own device.

1. Enable accessibility for Train Assist.
2. Open KorailTalk and reach the KTX search results (sold-out rows).
3. Return here and turn automation ON.
4. Switch back to KorailTalk. The app refreshes until a Price button appears, taps it, then taps Reserve. Stops before payment.
Opened reservation entry. Automation turned off.
